## 220   TP53 GO:2001244      ISS       BP
length(unique(tp53_go$GO)) # the number of unique GO tags for TP53
## [1] 184
# Supporting evidence for TP53 annotations
# EVIDENCE column: what kind of experimental evidence supports the involvement of the gene in a certain process
sum(tp53_go$EVIDENCE == "IMP") # the number of TP53 processes inferred from a mutant phenotype ("IMP")
## [1] 42
tbl <- sort(table(tp53_go$GO), decreasing = TRUE)
head(tbl) # GO tag with the most entries of supporting evidence
## 
## GO:0051726 GO:0000785 GO:0000978 GO:0000981 GO:0008285 GO:0010628 
##          4          3          3          3          3          3
# Using GO.db to to find the biological role of TP53
keytypes(GO.db)
## [1] "DEFINITION" "GOID"       "ONTOLOGY"   "TERM"
select(GO.db, keys = "GO:0051726", keytype = "GOID", columns = "TERM") # biological process of TP53 with the most types of supporting evidence
## 'select()' returned 1:1 mapping between keys and columns
##         GOID                     TERM
## 1 GO:0051726 regulation of cell cycle
# TP53 location liftOver to hg38 genome build
library(AnnotationHub)
ah <- AnnotationHub()
## snapshotDate(): 2022-10-31
ah_human <- subset(ah, species == "Homo sapiens")
query(ah, "TP53")
## AnnotationHub with 0 records
## # snapshotDate(): 2022-10-31
# chain file that specifies how features match across genome builds
ah.chain <- subset(ah, rdataclass == "ChainFile" & species == "Homo sapiens")
query(ah.chain, c("hg19", "hg38"))
## AnnotationHub with 4 records
## # snapshotDate(): 2022-10-31
## # $dataprovider: UCSC, NCBI
## # $species: Homo sapiens
## # $rdataclass: ChainFile
## # additional mcols(): taxonomyid, genome, description,
## #   coordinate_1_based, maintainer, rdatadateadded, preparerclass, tags,
## #   rdatapath, sourceurl, sourcetype 
## # retrieve records with, e.g., 'object[["AH14108"]]' 
## 
##             title                                        
##   AH14108 | hg38ToHg19.over.chain.gz                     
##   AH14150 | hg19ToHg38.over.chain.gz                     
##   AH78915 | Chain file for Homo sapiens rRNA hg19 to hg38
##   AH78916 | Chain file for Homo sapiens rRNA hg38 to hg19
ch <- ah[["AH14150"]]
## loading from cache
# perform the liftOver
TP53_19L <- liftOver(gene_coords[1], ch)
TP53_19L
## GRangesList object of length 1:
## $`7157`
## GRanges object with 1 range and 1 metadata column:
##       seqnames          ranges strand |     gene_id
##          <Rle>       <IRanges>  <Rle> | <character>
##   [1]    chr17 7661779-7687550      - |        7157
##   -------
##   seqinfo: 1 sequence from an unspecified genome; no seqlengths
# answers
hg19_to_hg38 = ah[["AH14150"]]
## loading from cache
library(rtracklayer)
liftOver(gene_coords, hg19_to_hg38)
## GRangesList object of length 1:
## $`7157`
## GRanges object with 1 range and 1 metadata column:
##       seqnames          ranges strand |     gene_id
##          <Rle>       <IRanges>  <Rle> | <character>
##   [1]    chr17 7661779-7687550      - |        7157
##   -------
##   seqinfo: 1 sequence from an unspecified genome; no seqlengths
# -----

# p53 signaling pathway from KEGG
# load KEGGREST package and inspect organism-specific gene pathways
library(KEGGREST)
p53 = keggGet("hsa04115")    # reference to a specific gene
names(p53[[1]])
##  [1] "ENTRY"       "NAME"        "DESCRIPTION" "CLASS"       "PATHWAY_MAP"
##  [6] "DRUG"        "ORGANISM"    "GENE"        "REL_PATHWAY" "KO_PATHWAY" 
## [11] "REFERENCE"
length(p53[[1]]$GENE)/2
## [1] 75
p53pat = p53[[1]]$GENE # gene symbol + description
type(p53pat)
## [1] "character"
sum(grepl("\\bcyclin\\b", p53pat))
## [1] 15
# OR
length(grep("cyclin", p53pat))
## [1] 15
p53pat[grep("cyclin", p53pat)]    # inspect gene names containing cyclin
##  [1] "CDK2; cyclin dependent kinase 2 [KO:K02206] [EC:2.7.11.22]"          
##  [2] "CDK4; cyclin dependent kinase 4 [KO:K02089] [EC:2.7.11.22]"          
##  [3] "CDK6; cyclin dependent kinase 6 [KO:K02091] [EC:2.7.11.22]"          
##  [4] "CDKN1A; cyclin dependent kinase inhibitor 1A [KO:K06625]"            
##  [5] "CDKN2A; cyclin dependent kinase inhibitor 2A [KO:K06621]"            
##  [6] "CCND1; cyclin D1 [KO:K04503]"                                        
##  [7] "CCNB1; cyclin B1 [KO:K05868]"                                        
##  [8] "CCND2; cyclin D2 [KO:K10151]"                                        
##  [9] "CCND3; cyclin D3 [KO:K10152]"                                        
## [10] "CCNE1; cyclin E1 [KO:K06626]"                                        
## [11] "CCNG1; cyclin G1 [KO:K10145]"                                        
## [12] "CCNG2; cyclin G2 [KO:K10146]"                                        
## [13] "CCNB2; cyclin B2 [KO:K21770]"                                        
## [14] "CCNE2; cyclin E2 [KO:K06626]"                                        
## [15] "CDK1; cyclin dependent kinase 1 [KO:K02087] [EC:2.7.11.22 2.7.11.23]"
